channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.copyright: Public domain text; audio CC BY-SA 4.0
channel.itunes:author: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: A one-minute reading from A Course in Miracles, every day. Short, reflective passages from the Text, Workbook, and Manual for Teachers.

item.title: Daily Minute — April 10, 2026
item.description: There is no order of difficulty in miracles. One is not "harder" or "bigger" than another. They are all the same. All expressions of love are maximal.
item.content:encoded:
"There is no order of difficulty in miracles. One is not 'harder' or 'bigger' than another. They are all the same. All expressions of love are maximal."

— Text, Chapter 1, Section I
